changes.description: JSON data layer re-synchronized to SEC-verified values for all 7 funds. The automated 'fetch_openinfra' GitHub Action (commit b72ec34) had reverted nav/historical/returns JSON to stale seed data after the 2026-06-26 manual update, leaving the dashboard's table/charts ~1-4 months behind index.html. Restored KKR & Ares May-2026 NAV and HL & PG FY2026 N-CSR NAV; brought ISQ/Stonepeak/Brookfield/HL snapshots current; confidence raised to HIGH with SEC citations. Root cause fixed in scripts/funds_config.json seed + fetch_openinfra_data.py so the daily 06:30 UTC job reproduces (not reverts) this state.
Class I Transactional NAV $30.52 as of May 31, 2026 (+0.63% vs Apr 30 $30.33). Total Transactional NAV $7,848.3M across 257,064,884 shares (Class I 86,634,176 @ $2,643,812K). GAAP NAV $7,589.5M.

Class I NAV $24.9295 as of May 31, 2026 (+0.20% vs Apr 30 $24.8805). Aggregate NAV $4,178.8M; portfolio fair value $6,699.6M. June 2026 distribution $0.20830/sh (Class I gross); Jul-Sep 2026 declared at $0.20830.

Class I NAV $15.79 as of May 8, 2026 (N-23C3A repurchase pricing; +1.81% vs audited Mar 31 $15.51). Audited FY2026 Class I NAV $15.51 (N-CSR) backfilled to the Mar-31 quarter (AUM $176.8M from NPORT-P).

Audited Class I Units NAV $1.91 as of Mar 31, 2026 (FY2026 year-end; progression $1.45 -> $1.71 -> $1.91). Class I net assets $261,592K; FY2026 total return after incentive 11.34%. Mar-31 quarter NAV backfilled (AUM $277.3M from NPORT-P).

Series II entered a revolving credit agreement on Jun 11, 2026: revolving loans up to an initial $60.0M aggregate principal (expandable to $180M), LTV covenant max 30% (Items 1.01/2.03). May 2026 monthly NAV 8-K not yet filed as of this run.

Rover (ACI Rover Parent, f/k/a BCP Renaissance) credit agreement closed Jun 9, 2026: $910.0M senior secured first-lien Term Loan B at Term SOFR + 2.25%, refinancing the ~$1.09B Initial Rover facility; 50% swapped at all-in 4.085%. June 2026 share sale $851.3M (34,147,331 shares) priced at May 31 NAV.
June 1, 2026 unregistered share sale finalized Jun 18: $243.9M total (Class I 3,842,531 sh/$117.3M; Class S 3,625,547/$110.6M; Class D 528,197/$16.1M). Cumulative offering ~$7,287M since inception.

Q2 2026 quarterly tender offer completed (expired Jun 18, 2026): 199,367 shares accepted 100% at the May 31, 2026 NAV; ~$4.91M paid Jun 26, 2026. Priced at already-recorded NAV; no new NAV/AUM data point.
changes.source_label: SEC SC TO-I/A Final Amendment (acc 0001104659-26-078246, filed 2026-06-26)

changes.description: Q1 2026 quarterly tender offer final results: 44,698 Class I + 2,297 Class R shares accepted 100% at the Mar 31, 2026 NAV. Priced at already-recorded NAV; no new NAV/AUM data point.
